categories.name: success_via_code_nav
categories.evidence: Agent used find_references to discover all 5 callers of the deprecated method. has_code_nav_tools=true.

categories.name: success_via_local_exec
categories.evidence: After editing, agent ran 'pytest tests/ -x' twice to verify. edit_verify_cycles=2 with final success.

categories.name: success_via_decomposition
categories.evidence: Agent planned the refactoring order: (1) update interface, (2) update implementations, (3) update callers, (4) run tests. Executed in sequence.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: multiple success strategies combined. Code navigation, local execution, and decomposition all contributed.
